items.title: Creator & BDFL
bullets: Founded Lyfie.org to build open-source products that make daily life and workflows simpler, faster, and better.
Built and shipped a multi-product portfolio from zero: Papyra, Luthor, SantaClaw, and TickTrack.
Owned product strategy, architecture, UI/UX, engineering, docs, and release execution end-to-end as creator and BDFL.
Turned complex systems into simple products with fast iteration, strong DX, and real user impact.
Scaled Lyfie with clear standards, transparent development, and community-first open-source discipline.

items.title: SDE II
bullets: Led client-facing delivery from pitch to production for global banking programs, driving strong conversion and rollout success.
Designed and deployed infrastructure for a .NET Core + React case management platform supporting AML and FINCrime investigations.
Integrated AI-assisted investigation workflows that improved analyst speed, triage quality, and decision confidence.
Built Power BI impact dashboards that clearly showed major client time savings and business value.
Modernized the platform to latest .NET stack standards, improving security posture, compliance readiness, and upgrade velocity.
Partnered with clients across US, UK, Australia, and Spain to align technical delivery with regional business and regulatory needs.
Led engineering teams to improve execution quality and collaboration between technical and client-facing workstreams.
Received 6+ awards in 3 years, including Outstanding Performance Award, with consistently strong manager and client feedback.
Delivered Deloitte firmwide .NET Core learning sessions to raise engineering capability across teams.

items.title: Papyra
bullets: Zero-database note platform where plain Markdown files remain the source of truth.
Near-instant sync via .NET 8 Minimal APIs + FileSystemWatcher + SignalR, including external edits from VS Code/Obsidian.
Google Keep-style speed with TanStack Query + Lexical, plus IAiService hooks for local Ollama AI.
Vendor-lock-free architecture keeps data portable, auditable, and backup-friendly.

items.title: Luthor
bullets: Dual-package Lexical platform: @lyfie/luthor for fast launch and @lyfie/luthor-headless for deep customization.
Production-ready editor stack across rich text, structure, embeds, code tooling, theming, and markdown/json interoperability.
Adoption proof: 2.6k+ npm downloads in 30 days across chat, docs, notes, and email presets.
Preset-first APIs reduced editor integration time from weeks to hours for product teams.

items.title: SantaClaw
bullets: Local-first AI ops agent built to catch silent homelab failures before outages.
Agentic observe-decide-notify/act loop across backups, jobs, services, storage, containers, and network health.
Safety-first automation with human-in-the-loop approvals, optional autonomy, Docker-first deployment, and AGPLv3 transparency.
Converts noisy infra signals into clear, prioritized remediation playbooks.

items.title: TickTrack
bullets: Free all-in-one Android tracker for counters, parallel timers, quick timers, and lap stopwatch workflows.
No-paywall core plus Google Drive backup for user-owned, portable, and recoverable data.
High-utility daily UX with AMOLED-friendly screensaver modes, customizable clock faces, and linked home-screen widgets.

about.text: Rahul NS Anand. View Projects (/projects). Read Blogs (/blogs). Contact Rahul (/contact). Roles: Creator & BDFL - lyfie.org (2026 - Present). Founded Lyfie.org to build open-source products that make daily life and workflows simpler, faster, and better. Built and shipped a multi-product portfolio from zero: Papyra, Luthor, SantaClaw, and TickTrack. Owned product strategy, architecture, UI/UX, engineering, docs, and release execution end-to-end as creator and BDFL. Turned complex systems into simple products with fast iteration, strong DX, and real user impact. Scaled Lyfie with clear standards, transparent development, and community-first open-source discipline. SDE II - Deloitte USI (2020 - Present). Led client-facing delivery from pitch to production for global banking programs, driving strong conversion and rollout success. Designed and deployed infrastructure for a .NET Core + React case management platform supporting AML and FINCrime investigations. Integrated AI-assisted investigation workflows that improved analyst speed, triage quality, and decision confidence. Built Power BI impact dashboards that clearly showed major client time savings and business value. Modernized the platform to latest .NET stack standards, improving security posture, compliance readiness, and upgrade velocity. Partnered with clients across US, UK, Australia, and Spain to align technical delivery with regional business and regulatory needs. Led engineering teams to improve execution quality and collaboration between technical and client-facing workstreams. Received 6+ awards in 3 years, including Outstanding Performance Award, with consistently strong manager and client feedback. Delivered Deloitte firmwide .NET Core learning sessions to raise engineering capability across teams. Builds: Papyra - Zero-Database Self-Hosted Notes Suite (ongoing). Zero-database note platform where plain Markdown files remain the source of truth. Near-instant sync via .NET 8 Minimal APIs + FileSystemWatcher + SignalR, including external edits from VS Code/Obsidian. Google Keep-style speed with TanStack Query + Lexical, plus IAiService hooks for local Ollama AI. Vendor-lock-free architecture keeps data portable, auditable, and backup-friendly. Luthor - Lexical Based Rich Text Editor (). Dual-package Lexical platform: @lyfie/luthor for fast launch and @lyfie/luthor-headless for deep customization. Production-ready editor stack across rich text, structure, embeds, code tooling, theming, and markdown/json interoperability. Adoption proof: 2.6k+ npm downloads in 30 days across chat, docs, notes, and email presets. Preset-first APIs reduced editor integration time from weeks to hours for product teams. SantaClaw - Local-First Homelab Automation AI Agent (). Local-first AI ops agent built to catch silent homelab failures before outages. Agentic observe-decide-notify/act loop across backups, jobs, services, storage, containers, and network health. Safety-first automation with human-in-the-loop approvals, optional autonomy, Docker-first deployment, and AGPLv3 transparency. Converts noisy infra signals into clear, prioritized remediation playbooks. TickTrack - Android Productivity Utility (). Free all-in-one Android tracker for counters, parallel timers, quick timers, and lap stopwatch workflows. No-paywall core plus Google Drive backup for user-owned, portable, and recoverable data. High-utility daily UX with AMOLED-friendly screensaver modes, customizable clock faces, and linked home-screen widgets.
